metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product experiences for the Mental Wellbeing Community Platform domain, covering member support, employer activation, contributor supply, and trust operations.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each experience carries only experience-specific flows. Each step lists the bricks and external systems used inside that experience.

capabilities.name: Find Support Fast
capabilities.description: Help members move from moment-of-need to a trustworthy next support action quickly.

flows.title: Find Support Fast
flows.description: Take a member from vague need to a confident next support step.

steps.title: Open Cadre and orient to the moment
keyFacts: Members often arrive with high emotional urgency and low patience.
The first screen must reduce effort rather than increase cognitive load.
painPoints: Members churn when support options feel generic or overwhelming.
Trust falls quickly when intent is misunderstood in the first session.

dependencies.name: Member Home and Intent Feed
dependencies.description: Personalized member home that assembles topic cues, next-best actions, and recovery paths.
dependencies.how: Uses Member Home and Intent Feed to narrow the field quickly.

dependencies.name: Topic and Pathway Taxonomy
dependencies.description: Structured topic graph for everyday mental wellbeing concerns, life stages, and support journeys.
dependencies.how: Uses Topic and Pathway Taxonomy to turn difficult feelings into understandable support pathways.

steps.title: Evaluate best next step
keyFacts: Members need enough confidence to act without a long diagnostic flow.
painPoints: Weak relevance causes members to postpone help or abandon the app.

dependencies.name: Support Recommendations
dependencies.description: Recommendation engine for live sessions, content, communities, and next-step support actions.
dependencies.how: Uses Support Recommendations to surface the most plausible next action.

dependencies.name: Search and Topic Retrieval
dependencies.description: Searches content, sessions, communities, and contributors by intent and topic.
dependencies.how: Uses Search and Topic Retrieval when members have explicit intent.

dependencies.name: Privacy, Consent, and Data Separation
dependencies.description: Consent enforcement, pseudonymity controls, and employer-safe data separation policies.
dependencies.how: Uses Privacy, Consent, and Data Separation to reinforce trust at the decision point.

steps.title: Take a support action
keyFacts: The product must convert discovery into a meaningful support interaction within the same session.
painPoints: Members lose momentum when handoffs from discovery to action are slow or unclear.

dependencies.name: Live Session Streaming
dependencies.description: Schedules, streams, and manages live support sessions and event participation.
dependencies.how: Uses Live Session Streaming to let members join live support immediately.

dependencies.name: Resource Directory and Care Navigation
dependencies.description: Trusted directory of resources, partner organizations, and next-step support options.
dependencies.how: Uses Resource Directory and Care Navigation when the right next step is informational or external.

capabilities.name: Participate in a Safe Community
capabilities.description: Help members join and benefit from supportive community interaction without exposing them to unsafe dynamics.

capabilities.name: Build a Sustainable Wellbeing Habit
capabilities.description: Turn one-time support into repeat participation through reminders, progress, and social continuity.

capabilities.name: Launch an Employer Benefit
capabilities.description: Help employer buyers and operators go from signed contract to live employee access quickly.

capabilities.name: Prove Benefit Value
capabilities.description: Give employer buyers and operators enough signal to renew, adjust, and expand the Cadre program responsibly.

capabilities.name: Publish and Host Trusted Support Content
capabilities.description: Enable contributors to create and deliver high-trust content and live sessions efficiently.

capabilities.name: Run Custom Live Events
capabilities.description: Design, staff, and run employer-tailored live events that feel relevant and professionally executed.

capabilities.name: Preserve Privacy and Safe Escalation
capabilities.description: Protect member confidentiality, enforce boundaries, and route higher-risk situations appropriately.
